tools.name: search_merchants
tools.description: Search OP-verified merchants by rail, chain, category, agent-callable tier, trust tier, and free text. Ranked by trust tier then verification recency.

tools.name: get_merchant
tools.description: Get the full record for one merchant including all rails, payment endpoints, and OP attestation. Tier 2+ requires an AT credential.

tools.name: verify_payment_endpoint
tools.description: Run a live check against a merchant's declared payment endpoint for a rail. Returns health, detail, and rail-specific evidence.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List the category taxonomy with merchant counts.

tools.name: list_rails
tools.description: List supported payment rails and their current merchant counts.

tools.name: whoami
tools.description: Report the resolved credential state and rate limits for the calling agent.
